TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == mahaymaw ku duut mahaymaw ku duutŚ§©ťĽĎŚĺóŚĺąśÖĘ nulaculan ‚Ä¶.anu enem tu abataan ku mihca nu misu, haymaw han miadih kina sulit, "mahaymaw duut" ina sulit, taneg masumad ku nipiadih tu nikaudip, lapahak misuayaw tu nikaudip. anu cay kisu palutatenga semsem han miasip. masasu hicay kya amisulitay makaalaay tu nisulitan a kawlah ci Cu-ta-sin patahekal cinida tu baluhay nisulitan nida tu yanayu'ay a asipan, u kamu nida tu sakaybabalaki nikaudip tu balakiay tu micedek ibalucu malucek kya kamunida, yakamu tu cacacacay duma kupicedek ibalucu'. u tademaw anu enem tu bataan micumud tu balaki sa, katuku duut sat u, i mahini idaw ku kapahy a haekal a adihan datengen, datengen yu, sibalucu mahicay kya, cay tu kabaluduh. šļļŚĺě60 . sayaway a adihan nu hekal sa, u pacabayay itepal alaw han inayay tu . nu wama, nu baki alalumaan miliyas tu naming, u malselalay cay tu pakasikul titaan, u wawa ha tu wawa sa nay i ku lawad nu heni alahican maluayaw ku cacay miliyas dangtu kuni kaudip, u pacabayay tisuwan , wida satu u demiad nayay t uku laheci maudip, sisa kanca minanam tataytay maudip mitanam tu kakanen a nikaudip misuayaw tu aniwiyu. Áą∂Ťľ©, . saka tusa a adihan nu hekal sa, u sayku alaw han adidi a didi. . u naayaway a kawaw sa maminay tu ku naayaway sa, u tademaw yu mahida henay tabaki ku kasingangan, balaki sa tu malecad tu tu cayay kahica atademaw, balaki u baki tu u bay i tu isasa nu dingki cay tup aka dadingu, sisa sadep han miadih ku taw, hanipi milihida hank u balucu' i tida pakaluwaluwah cay tu kaw nikawsasuinap kasasu ada amibulibul. . saka tulu a adihan nu hekal sa, taluayaw adadan simikawaay. . Mangeli' ku ukak, mapuut ku culil nu idang, masukut ku punu', singang ku udip, u mahiniay akay tayni namin mididaw titaan, kai han haw! cay kaw hahidaan. Sisa minanam kita tu imelang hicaen masasucabay, siimelang a maudip, hida u cbay ku imelang nu udip, amana kasingalih inayay ku imelang aku sa, samuhmuh sa maudip, sisa sakapahen ku udip kahina latlat tu udip winisa u kawaw isu tu dedemiad, sisa pacici han sakamuen ku udip saicelangn han nimaaca ku udip saicelangen nu misu. saka sepat a adihan nu hekal sa, amalingatu i kakabian maudip,mahida yu wawahenay. sayaway ladayen nuna kami tayni, i kakabian; namayni i mahicahicaay a nikaudip misaicelang tu sakaudip, sadikuday sa katukuh tu nusayaway i kakabian, misuayaw tu musikulay, . u cay kalecad sa, yu tayni kita idaw ku wina musikul titaan, amuculil kitasa, alahican idaw ku musikulay, kanahatu idaw ku musikulay, udumasa cay tu kahida nu wina a nipisikul. u yadahay sa u matawaay tu amusililay nu padekuwan ya tawa nu heni sakaedengan sa. sisa satedeb han mikukay aca kita tu henian.kanca aca mukukay tu henuan. . saka lima a adihan nu hekal sa, muculil idadan katuud ku pahengaday. . u pahengaday a tademaw matineng tu babalaki kasikalisiw nu alubu, kiyu mapatay midateng hica a pahengad ku kalisiw, pakatelay, pasulit tu telay, patigami, mitanam mukan, mitanam miyung, mitanam mitengil, pasakalamkam tu cacanan, pacakay tu sakamayseng a kakanan, tayda i biyu, mamin, maydih tu kalisiw maydih mikihkih tu kalisiw nu babalaki, mahini sa katineng, sakapahen musinga ku kalisiw, mana kasabana' micukaymas tu kalisiw sanu udip han. . saka enem a adihan nu hekal sa, sakapahen ku acawa isu "u cabay sakapahay a cabay" . yu musakamu sadihemayen ku kamu paayaw i ku acawaw, sakapahen ku acawaw, wida u acawa nu udip atu cinida, u wawa u hen isa sadikuday amusikul tisuwa sadikuday anisuped numisu, madem tu ku enem a bataan, mana kasingalih tu wawa, uwawa idaw ku labunuluma nu heni, sadikuday sa itatu u babalaki malacawaay masasuluung a maudip. . hatini tu ku mihcaan cima henay kumasumaday nu balucu',widasa metalaw anu nayay tu kucacay. . ‚Ä¶‚Ä¶nu ayawan nu duut, nikaudip nu tademaw tu sadikuday, u takelal nu dadan hamaw sa a duut duut duut, mahini sa macunus ku utiih a muculil. kyu, enem tu bataan masametek tu ku nikaudip, kasaetimen tu udip,amana tu pihamin tu kawaw nu sayku, mana pihamin mikawaw tu nu baki a lalumaan, amana kasa u babalaki kaku sa, musakamu sa talakaw ku ngiha, mahida u pasengengay, hani pasusun sahahany, adih han maduka t uku udip. u babalaki hanany katineng masasusikad, imahini sa piliwkay i, u cacanan sa abesa han kunikaudip wica henay kulaluutan nu babalaki, sisa pahelak hank u nikaudip, samehmeh han. ‚Ä¶.." mahamaw ku duut" u nikaudip nu babalaki tatenga mahini ku nikaudip nu babalaki, ina kamu micedek ibalucu', mapacekil ku balycu', sisa inasulit pabien ku cabay kaput ngy matineng tu kakawaw nu babalaki, sakapah han tu amududuc tu nikaudip hacica tu ku demiad nu babalaki sadikuday tu a tisiyaba!‚Ä¶.. .......... .....
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == mańßajmaw ku duut mańßajmaw ku duut***** nur~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan *.anu …ôn…ôm tu abataan ku mińß ¶a nu misu, ńßajmaw ńßan miadińß kina sur~…ĺit, "mańßajmaw duut" ina sur~…ĺit, tan…ôg masumad ku nipiadińß tu nikaudip, r~…ĺapańßak misuajaw tu nikaudip. anu ¶aj kisu par~…ĺutat…ôŇča s…ôms…ôm ńßan miasip. masasu ńßi ¶aj kja amisur~…ĺitaj makaar~…ĺaaj tu nisur~…ĺitan a kawr~…ĺańß ¶i ¶u-ta-sin patańß…ôkar~…ĺ ¶inida tu bar~…ĺuńßaj nisur~…ĺitan nida tu janaju Ē~ °aj a asipan, u kamu nida tu sakajbabar~…ĺaki nikaudip tu bar~…ĺakiaj tu mi ¶…ôd…ôk ibar~…ĺu ¶u mar~…ĺu ¶…ôk kja kamunida, jakamu tu ¶a ¶a ¶a ¶aj duma kupi ¶…ôd…ôk ibar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °. u tad…ômaw anu …ôn…ôm tu bataan mi ¶umud tu bar~…ĺaki sa, katuku duut sat u, i mańßini idaw ku kapańßj a ńßa…ôkar~…ĺ a adińßan dat…ôŇč…ôn, dat…ôŇč…ôn ju, sibar~…ĺu ¶u mańßi ¶aj kja, ¶aj tu kabar~…ĺuduńß. **** . sajawaj a adińßan nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ sa, u pa ¶abajaj it…ôpar~…ĺ ar~…ĺaw ńßan inajaj tu . nu wama, nu baki ar~…ĺar~…ĺumaan mir~…ĺijas tu namiŇč, u mar~…ĺs…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺaj ¶aj tu pakasikur~…ĺ titaan, u wawa ńßa tu wawa sa naj i ku r~…ĺawad nu ńß…ôni ar~…ĺańßi ¶an mar~…ĺuajaw ku ¶a ¶aj mir~…ĺijas daŇčtu kuni kaudip, u pa ¶abajaj tisuwan , wida satu u d…ômiad najaj t uku r~…ĺańß…ô ¶i maudip, sisa kan ¶a minanam tatajtaj maudip mitanam tu kakan…ôn a nikaudip misuajaw tu aniwiju. **, . saka tusa a adińßan nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ sa, u sajku ar~…ĺaw ńßan adidi a didi. . u naajawaj a kawaw sa maminaj tu ku naajawaj sa, u tad…ômaw ju mańßida ńß…ônaj tabaki ku kasiŇčaŇčan, bar~…ĺaki sa tu mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu tu ¶ajaj kańßi ¶a atad…ômaw, bar~…ĺaki u baki tu u baj i tu isasa nu diŇčki ¶aj tup aka dadiŇču, sisa sad…ôp ńßan miadińß ku taw, ńßanipi mir~…ĺińßida ńßank u bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° i tida pakar~…ĺuwar~…ĺuwańß ¶aj tu kaw nikawsasuinap kasasu ada amibur~…ĺibur~…ĺ. . saka tur~…ĺu a adińßan nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ sa, tar~…ĺuajaw adadan simikawaaj. . maŇč…ôr~…ĺi Ē~ ° ku ukak, mapuut ku ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ nu idaŇč, masukut ku punu Ē~ °, siŇčaŇč ku udip, u mańßiniaj akaj tajni namin mididaw titaan, kai ńßan ńßaw! ¶aj kaw ńßańßidaan. sisa minanam kita tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč ńßi ¶a…ôn masasu ¶abaj, siim…ôr~…ĺaŇč a maudip, ńßida u ¶baj ku im…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu udip, amana kasiŇčar~…ĺińß inajaj ku im…ôr~…ĺaŇč aku sa, samuńßmuńß sa maudip, sisa sakapańß…ôn ku udip kańßina r~…ĺatr~…ĺat tu udip winisa u kawaw isu tu d…ôd…ômiad, sisa pa ¶i ¶i ńßan sakamu…ôn ku udip sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčn ńßan nimaa ¶a ku udip sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč…ôn nu misu. saka s…ôpat a adińßan nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ sa, amar~…ĺiŇčatu i kakabian maudip,mańßida ju wawańß…ônaj. sajawaj r~…ĺadaj…ôn nuna kami tajni, i kakabian; namajni i mańßi ¶ańßi ¶aaj a nikaudip misai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč tu sakaudip, sadikudaj sa katukuńß tu nusajawaj i kakabian, misuajaw tu musikur~…ĺaj, . u ¶aj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad sa, ju tajni kita idaw ku wina musikur~…ĺ titaan, amu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ kitasa, ar~…ĺańßi ¶an idaw ku musikur~…ĺaj, kanańßatu idaw ku musikur~…ĺaj, udumasa ¶aj tu kańßida nu wina a nipisikur~…ĺ. u jadańßaj sa u matawaaj tu amusir~…ĺir~…ĺaj nu pad…ôkuwan ja tawa nu ńß…ôni saka…ôd…ôŇčan sa. sisa sat…ôd…ôb ńßan mikukaj a ¶a kita tu ńß…ônian.kan ¶a a ¶a mukukaj tu ńß…ônuan. . saka r~…ĺima a adińßan nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ sa, mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ idadan katuud ku pańß…ôŇčadaj. . u pańß…ôŇčadaj a tad…ômaw matin…ôŇč tu babar~…ĺaki kasikar~…ĺisiw nu ar~…ĺubu, kiju mapataj midat…ôŇč ńßi ¶a a pańß…ôŇčad ku kar~…ĺisiw, pakat…ôr~…ĺaj, pasur~…ĺit tu t…ôr~…ĺaj, patigami, mitanam mukan, mitanam mijuŇč, mitanam mit…ôŇčir~…ĺ, pasakar~…ĺamkam tu ¶a ¶anan, pa ¶akaj tu sakamajs…ôŇč a kakanan, tajda i biju, mamin, majdińß tu kar~…ĺisiw majdińß mikińßkińß tu kar~…ĺisiw nu babar~…ĺaki, mańßini sa katin…ôŇč, sakapańß…ôn musiŇča ku kar~…ĺisiw, mana kasabana Ē~ ° mi ¶ukajmas tu kar~…ĺisiw sanu udip ńßan. . saka …ôn…ôm a adińßan nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ sa, sakapańß…ôn ku a ¶awa isu "u ¶abaj sakapańßaj a ¶abaj" . ju musakamu sadińß…ômaj…ôn ku kamu paajaw i ku a ¶awaw, sakapańß…ôn ku a ¶awaw, wida u a ¶awa nu udip atu ¶inida, u wawa u ńß…ôn isa sadikudaj amusikur~…ĺ tisuwa sadikudaj anisup…ôd numisu, mad…ôm tu ku …ôn…ôm a bataan, mana kasiŇčar~…ĺińß tu wawa, uwawa idaw ku r~…ĺabunur~…ĺuma nu ńß…ôni, sadikudaj sa itatu u babar~…ĺaki mar~…ĺa ¶awaaj masasur~…ĺuuŇč a maudip. . ńßatini tu ku mińß ¶aan ¶ima ńß…ônaj kumasumadaj nu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °,widasa m…ôtar~…ĺaw anu najaj tu ku ¶a ¶aj. . **nu ajawan nu duut, nikaudip nu tad…ômaw tu sadikudaj, u tak…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ nu dadan ńßamaw sa a duut duut duut, mańßini sa ma ¶unus ku utiińß a mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ. kju, …ôn…ôm tu bataan masam…ôt…ôk tu ku nikaudip, kasa…ôtim…ôn tu udip,amana tu pińßamin tu kawaw nu sajku, mana pińßamin mikawaw tu nu baki a r~…ĺar~…ĺumaan, amana kasa u babar~…ĺaki kaku sa, musakamu sa tar~…ĺakaw ku Ňčińßa, mańßida u pas…ôŇč…ôŇčaj, ńßani pasusun sańßańßanj, adińß ńßan maduka t uku udip. u babar~…ĺaki ńßananj katin…ôŇč masasusikad, imańßini sa pir~…ĺiwkaj i, u ¶a ¶anan sa ab…ôsa ńßan kunikaudip wi ¶a ńß…ônaj kur~…ĺar~…ĺuutan nu babar~…ĺaki, sisa pańß…ôr~…ĺak ńßank u nikaudip, sam…ôńßm…ôńß ńßan. *.." mańßamaw ku duut" u nikaudip nu babar~…ĺaki tat…ôŇča mańßini ku nikaudip nu babar~…ĺaki, ina kamu mi ¶…ôd…ôk ibar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °, mapa ¶…ôkir~…ĺ ku bar~…ĺj ¶u Ē~ °, sisa inasur~…ĺit pabi…ôn ku ¶abaj kaput Ňčj matin…ôŇč tu kakawaw nu babar~…ĺaki, sakapańß ńßan tu amududu ¶ tu nikaudip ńßa ¶i ¶a tu ku d…ômiad nu babar~…ĺaki sadikudaj tu a tisijaba!*.. .......... .....
S.FORM: == kakiliman == mahaymaw ku duut mahaymaw ku duutŚ§©ťĽĎŚĺóŚĺąśÖĘ nulaculan ‚Ä¶.anu enem tu abataan ku mihca nu misu, haymaw han miadih kina sulit, "mahaymaw duut" ina sulit, taneg masumad ku nipiadih tu nikaudip, lapahak misuayaw tu nikaudip. anu cay kisu palutatenga semsem han miasip. masasu hicay kya amisulitay makaalaay tu nisulitan a kawlah ci Cu-ta-sin patahekal cinida tu baluhay nisulitan nida tu yanayu'ay a asipan, u kamu nida tu sakaybabalaki nikaudip tu balakiay tu micedek ibalucu malucek kya kamunida, yakamu tu cacacacay duma kupicedek ibalucu'. u tademaw anu enem tu bataan micumud tu balaki sa, katuku duut sat u, i mahini idaw ku kapahy a haekal a adihan datengen, datengen yu, sibalucu mahicay kya, cay tu kabaluduh. šļļŚĺě60 . sayaway a adihan nu hekal sa, u pacabayay itepal alaw han inayay tu . nu wama, nu baki alalumaan miliyas tu naming, u malselalay cay tu pakasikul titaan, u wawa ha tu wawa sa nay i ku lawad nu heni alahican maluayaw ku cacay miliyas dangtu kuni kaudip, u pacabayay tisuwan , wida satu u demiad nayay t uku laheci maudip, sisa kanca minanam tataytay maudip mitanam tu kakanen a nikaudip misuayaw tu aniwiyu. Áą∂Ťľ©, . saka tusa a adihan nu hekal sa, u sayku alaw han adidi a didi. . u naayaway a kawaw sa maminay tu ku naayaway sa, u tademaw yu mahida henay tabaki ku kasingangan, balaki sa tu malecad tu tu cayay kahica atademaw, balaki u baki tu u bay i tu isasa nu dingki cay tup aka dadingu, sisa sadep han miadih ku taw, hanipi milihida hank u balucu' i tida pakaluwaluwah cay tu kaw nikawsasuinap kasasu ada amibulibul. . saka tulu a adihan nu hekal sa, taluayaw adadan simikawaay. . Mangeli' ku ukak, mapuut ku culil nu idang, masukut ku punu', singang ku udip, u mahiniay akay tayni namin mididaw titaan, kai han haw! cay kaw hahidaan. Sisa minanam kita tu imelang hicaen masasucabay, siimelang a maudip, hida u cbay ku imelang nu udip, amana kasingalih inayay ku imelang aku sa, samuhmuh sa maudip, sisa sakapahen ku udip kahina latlat tu udip winisa u kawaw isu tu dedemiad, sisa pacici han sakamuen ku udip saicelangn han nimaaca ku udip saicelangen nu misu. saka sepat a adihan nu hekal sa, amalingatu i kakabian maudip,mahida yu wawahenay. sayaway ladayen nuna kami tayni, i kakabian; namayni i mahicahicaay a nikaudip misaicelang tu sakaudip, sadikuday sa katukuh tu nusayaway i kakabian, misuayaw tu musikulay, . u cay kalecad sa, yu tayni kita idaw ku wina musikul titaan, amuculil kitasa, alahican idaw ku musikulay, kanahatu idaw ku musikulay, udumasa cay tu kahida nu wina a nipisikul. u yadahay sa u matawaay tu amusililay nu padekuwan ya tawa nu heni sakaedengan sa. sisa satedeb han mikukay aca kita tu henian.kanca aca mukukay tu henuan. . saka lima a adihan nu hekal sa, muculil idadan katuud ku pahengaday. . u pahengaday a tademaw matineng tu babalaki kasikalisiw nu alubu, kiyu mapatay midateng hica a pahengad ku kalisiw, pakatelay, pasulit tu telay, patigami, mitanam mukan, mitanam miyung, mitanam mitengil, pasakalamkam tu cacanan, pacakay tu sakamayseng a kakanan, tayda i biyu, mamin, maydih tu kalisiw maydih mikihkih tu kalisiw nu babalaki, mahini sa katineng, sakapahen musinga ku kalisiw, mana kasabana' micukaymas tu kalisiw sanu udip han. . saka enem a adihan nu hekal sa, sakapahen ku acawa isu "u cabay sakapahay a cabay" . yu musakamu sadihemayen ku kamu paayaw i ku acawaw, sakapahen ku acawaw, wida u acawa nu udip atu cinida, u wawa u hen isa sadikuday amusikul tisuwa sadikuday anisuped numisu, madem tu ku enem a bataan, mana kasingalih tu wawa, uwawa idaw ku labunuluma nu heni, sadikuday sa itatu u babalaki malacawaay masasuluung a maudip. . hatini tu ku mihcaan cima henay kumasumaday nu balucu',widasa metalaw anu nayay tu kucacay. . ‚Ä¶‚Ä¶nu ayawan nu duut, nikaudip nu tademaw tu sadikuday, u takelal nu dadan hamaw sa a duut duut duut, mahini sa macunus ku utiih a muculil. kyu, enem tu bataan masametek tu ku nikaudip, kasaetimen tu udip,amana tu pihamin tu kawaw nu sayku, mana pihamin mikawaw tu nu baki a lalumaan, amana kasa u babalaki kaku sa, musakamu sa talakaw ku ngiha, mahida u pasengengay, hani pasusun sahahany, adih han maduka t uku udip. u babalaki hanany katineng masasusikad, imahini sa piliwkay i, u cacanan sa abesa han kunikaudip wica henay kulaluutan nu babalaki, sisa pahelak hank u nikaudip, samehmeh han. ‚Ä¶.." mahamaw ku duut" u nikaudip nu babalaki tatenga mahini ku nikaudip nu babalaki, ina kamu micedek ibalucu', mapacekil ku balycu', sisa inasulit pabien ku cabay kaput ngy matineng tu kakawaw nu babalaki, sakapah han tu amududuc tu nikaudip hacica tu ku demiad nu babalaki sadikuday tu a tisiyaba!‚Ä¶.. .......... .....

tan…ôg masumad ku nipiadińß tu nikaudip, r~…ĺapańßak misuajaw tu nikaudip. anu ¶aj kisu par~…ĺutat…ôŇča s…ôms…ôm ńßan miasip. masasu ńßi ¶aj kja amisur~…ĺitaj makaar~…ĺaaj tu nisur~…ĺitan a kawr~…ĺańß ¶i ¶u-ta-sin patańß…ôkar~…ĺ ¶inida tu bar~…ĺuńßaj nisur~…ĺitan nida tu janaju Ē~ °aj a asipan, u kamu nida tu sakajbabar~…ĺaki nikaudip tu bar~…ĺakiaj tu mi ¶…ôd…ôk ibar~…ĺu ¶u mar~…ĺu ¶…ôk kja kamunida, jakamu tu ¶a ¶a ¶a ¶aj duma kupi ¶…ôd…ôk ibar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °. u tad…ômaw anu …ôn…ôm tu bataan mi ¶umud tu bar~…ĺaki sa, katuku duut sat u, i mańßini idaw ku kapańßj a ńßa…ôkar~…ĺ a adińßan dat…ôŇč…ôn, dat…ôŇč…ôn ju, sibar~…ĺu ¶u mańßi ¶aj kja, ¶aj tu kabar~…ĺuduńß. **** . sajawaj a adińßan nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ sa, u pa ¶abajaj it…ôpar~…ĺ ar~…ĺaw ńßan inajaj tu . nu wama, nu baki ar~…ĺar~…ĺumaan mir~…ĺijas tu namiŇč, u mar~…ĺs…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺaj ¶aj tu pakasikur~…ĺ titaan, u wawa ńßa tu wawa sa naj i ku r~…ĺawad nu ńß…ôni ar~…ĺańßi ¶an mar~…ĺuajaw ku ¶a ¶aj mir~…ĺijas daŇčtu kuni kaudip, u pa ¶abajaj tisuwan , wida satu u d…ômiad najaj t uku r~…ĺańß…ô ¶i maudip, sisa kan ¶a minanam tatajtaj maudip mitanam tu kakan…ôn a nikaudip misuajaw tu aniwiju. **, . saka tusa a adińßan nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ sa, u sajku ar~…ĺaw ńßan adidi a didi. . u naajawaj a kawaw sa maminaj tu ku naajawaj sa, u tad…ômaw ju mańßida ńß…ônaj tabaki ku kasiŇčaŇčan, bar~…ĺaki sa tu mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu tu ¶ajaj kańßi ¶a atad…ômaw, bar~…ĺaki u baki tu u baj i tu isasa nu diŇčki ¶aj tup aka dadiŇču, sisa sad…ôp ńßan miadińß ku taw, ńßanipi mir~…ĺińßida ńßank u bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° i tida pakar~…ĺuwar~…ĺuwańß ¶aj tu kaw nikawsasuinap kasasu ada amibur~…ĺibur~…ĺ. . saka tur~…ĺu a adińßan nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ sa, tar~…ĺuajaw adadan simikawaaj. . maŇč…ôr~…ĺi Ē~ ° ku ukak, mapuut ku ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ nu idaŇč, masukut ku punu Ē~ °, siŇčaŇč ku udip, u mańßiniaj akaj tajni namin mididaw titaan, kai ńßan ńßaw! ¶aj kaw ńßańßidaan. sisa minanam kita tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč ńßi ¶a…ôn masasu ¶abaj, siim…ôr~…ĺaŇč a maudip, ńßida u ¶baj ku im…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu udip, amana kasiŇčar~…ĺińß inajaj ku im…ôr~…ĺaŇč aku sa, samuńßmuńß sa maudip, sisa sakapańß…ôn ku udip kańßina r~…ĺatr~…ĺat tu udip winisa u kawaw isu tu d…ôd…ômiad, sisa pa ¶i ¶i ńßan sakamu…ôn ku udip sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčn ńßan nimaa ¶a ku udip sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč…ôn nu misu. saka s…ôpat a adińßan nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ sa, amar~…ĺiŇčatu i kakabian maudip,mańßida ju wawańß…ônaj. sajawaj r~…ĺadaj…ôn nuna kami tajni, i kakabian; namajni i mańßi ¶ańßi ¶aaj a nikaudip misai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč tu sakaudip, sadikudaj sa katukuńß tu nusajawaj i kakabian, misuajaw tu musikur~…ĺaj, . u ¶aj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad sa, ju tajni kita idaw ku wina musikur~…ĺ titaan, amu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ kitasa, ar~…ĺańßi ¶an idaw ku musikur~…ĺaj, kanańßatu idaw ku musikur~…ĺaj, udumasa ¶aj tu kańßida nu wina a nipisikur~…ĺ. u jadańßaj sa u matawaaj tu amusir~…ĺir~…ĺaj nu pad…ôkuwan ja tawa nu ńß…ôni saka…ôd…ôŇčan sa. sisa sat…ôd…ôb ńßan mikukaj a ¶a kita tu ńß…ônian.kan ¶a a ¶a mukukaj tu ńß…ônuan. . saka r~…ĺima a adińßan nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ sa, mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ idadan katuud ku pańß…ôŇčadaj. . u pańß…ôŇčadaj a tad…ômaw matin…ôŇč tu babar~…ĺaki kasikar~…ĺisiw nu ar~…ĺubu, kiju mapataj midat…ôŇč ńßi ¶a a pańß…ôŇčad ku kar~…ĺisiw, pakat…ôr~…ĺaj, pasur~…ĺit tu t…ôr~…ĺaj, patigami, mitanam mukan, mitanam mijuŇč, mitanam mit…ôŇčir~…ĺ, pasakar~…ĺamkam tu ¶a ¶anan, pa ¶akaj tu sakamajs…ôŇč a kakanan, tajda i biju, mamin, majdińß tu kar~…ĺisiw majdińß mikińßkińß tu kar~…ĺisiw nu babar~…ĺaki, mańßini sa katin…ôŇč, sakapańß…ôn musiŇča ku kar~…ĺisiw, mana kasabana Ē~ ° mi ¶ukajmas tu kar~…ĺisiw sanu udip ńßan. . saka …ôn…ôm a adińßan nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ sa, sakapańß…ôn ku a ¶awa isu "u ¶abaj sakapańßaj a ¶abaj" . ju musakamu sadińß…ômaj…ôn ku kamu paajaw i ku a ¶awaw, sakapańß…ôn ku a ¶awaw, wida u a ¶awa nu udip atu ¶inida, u wawa u ńß…ôn isa sadikudaj amusikur~…ĺ tisuwa sadikudaj anisup…ôd numisu, mad…ôm tu ku …ôn…ôm a bataan, mana kasiŇčar~…ĺińß tu wawa, uwawa idaw ku r~…ĺabunur~…ĺuma nu ńß…ôni, sadikudaj sa itatu u babar~…ĺaki mar~…ĺa ¶awaaj masasur~…ĺuuŇč a maudip. . ńßatini tu ku mińß ¶aan ¶ima ńß…ônaj kumasumadaj nu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °,widasa m…ôtar~…ĺaw anu najaj tu ku ¶a ¶aj. . **nu ajawan nu duut, nikaudip nu tad…ômaw tu sadikudaj, u tak…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ nu dadan ńßamaw sa a duut duut duut, mańßini sa ma ¶unus ku utiińß a mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ. kju, …ôn…ôm tu bataan masam…ôt…ôk tu ku nikaudip, kasa…ôtim…ôn tu udip,amana tu pińßamin tu kawaw nu sajku, mana pińßamin mikawaw tu nu baki a r~…ĺar~…ĺumaan, amana kasa u babar~…ĺaki kaku sa, musakamu sa tar~…ĺakaw ku Ňčińßa, mańßida u pas…ôŇč…ôŇčaj, ńßani pasusun sańßańßanj, adińß ńßan maduka t uku udip. u babar~…ĺaki ńßananj katin…ôŇč masasusikad, imańßini sa pir~…ĺiwkaj i, u ¶a ¶anan sa ab…ôsa ńßan kunikaudip wi ¶a ńß…ônaj kur~…ĺar~…ĺuutan nu babar~…ĺaki, sisa pańß…ôr~…ĺak ńßank u nikaudip, sam…ôńßm…ôńß ńßan. *.." mańßamaw ku duut" u nikaudip nu babar~…ĺaki tat…ôŇča mańßini ku nikaudip nu babar~…ĺaki, ina kamu mi ¶…ôd…ôk ibar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °, mapa ¶…ôkir~…ĺ ku bar~…ĺj ¶u Ē~ °, sisa inasur~…ĺit pabi…ôn ku ¶abaj kaput Ňčj matin…ôŇč tu kakawaw nu babar~…ĺaki, sakapańß ńßan tu amududu ¶ tu nikaudip ńßa ¶i ¶a tu ku d…ômiad nu babar~…ĺaki sadikudaj tu a tisijaba!*.. .......... .....
